name: smart-expense-tracker-root
description: Root proxies for Smart Expense Tracker fullstack deployment

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend || node "%npm_execpath%" install --prefix backend || node "$npm_execpath" install --prefix backend
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend || node "%npm_execpath%" install --prefix backend || node "$npm_execpath" install --prefix backend
scripts.start: npm start --prefix backend || node "%npm_execpath%" start --prefix backend || node "$npm_execpath" start --prefix backend
scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix backend || node "%npm_execpath%" run dev --prefix backend || node "$npm_execpath" run dev --prefix backend
